violations.description: THAWING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (2 pts): Potentially hazardous food (Chili) noted not being thawed using approved methods.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): The three compartment sink was noted not being properly operated. Soapy water noted in middle sink.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reachin cooler door interior and counter edges noted not in good repair.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors under and around in place equipmetn and ceiling tiles around vents and vents in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Main kitchen reachin cooler door interior and counter edges noted not in good repair.
